name: Killer
description:
__Height:__ 195 cm (6'5")
__Affiliation:__ Kid Pirates
__Bounty:__  ~!200,000,00 (previously:162,000,000)!~

Killer is a fighting crewman serving under  [Eustass Kid](https://anilist.co/character/14989/Eustass-Kid) as one of the Kid Pirates. A native of South Blue, he is one of the Eleven Supernovas appearing on the Shabaody Archipelago and one of the only two that aren't captains, also the second appearing Supernova who does not seem to be in the possesion of Devil Fruit powers. Killer is seen using a pair of scythe-bladed weapons that are capable of spinning around or being used as hand scythes these are used in combination with his kicks and high agility to make him into a truly formidable foe.

~!Following the confrontation with Kaidou, unknown events occurred, leading to Killer eating a defective SMILE and taking on the alias of Kamazou the Manslayer, a street murderer in Wano Country who secretly acted as an assassin working for the shogun, Kurozumi Orochi, until the shogun discarded him after he failed his mission to kill Toko.!~
